[ryde_health] B1 — Both bands: band question re-asked on open availability query
[ryde_health] B2 — Exhausted slots: agent asks for alternative day
[ryde_health] B3 — Morning selected: first-and-last slot pair offered (STEP 9)
[ryde_health] B4 — Unavailable time: nearest-pair alternative offered
[ryde_health] C1 — Time confirmed: CONFIRMATION spoken + universal_router confirm_time
[ryde_health] C2 — No-availability retry: new timeframe triggers availability tool
[ryde_health] D1 — ASAP timeframe: availability tool called find_next_available
[ryde_health] D2 — Specific day: availability tool called with slots detail
[ryde_health] E1 — No timeframe: agent asks when
[ryde_health] E3 — Abandon availability: universal_router called
[ryde_health] E4 — Service pivot escape: universal_router change_service
[ryde_health] E5 — Practitioner change: universal_router change_practitioner
[ryde_health] E6 — Time change: universal_router change_time
[ryde_health] E7 — Location change: universal_router change_location
[ryde_health] E8 — Multiple changes: universal_router multiple_changes
[ryde_health] M1 — Multi-pract with first_available: slot offer, no preference question
[ryde_health] M2 — Multi-pract: 'next available' triggers direct CONFIRMATION
[ryde_health] M3 — Multi-pract no first_available: preference question at STEP 5
[ryde_health] M4 — Multi-pract: named practitioner stored, continues
[ryde_health] M5 — Ambiguous practitioner name: disambiguation question
[ryde_health] M6 — Single practitioner: no preference question, slot offer
[ryde_health] S7A — STEP 7 no-match + first_available: proactive offer made
[ryde_health] S7B — S7 caller confirms proactive offer: CONFIRMATION + universal_router
[ryde_health] S7C — S7 caller names specific time: agent reads slot from Tuesday afternoon
[ryde_health] S7D — S7 relative earlier signal: morning band selected, morning slots offered
[ryde_health] S7E — S7 general decline: clarifying question asked
[ryde_health] S7F — S7 different day named (Saturday): slots offered without smart_router
[ryde_health] S7G — S7 no first_available: old day-list fallback behaviour
